name: Butter Pecan Crunch
recipeIngredient: 1 quart Butter pecan ice cream; soft
recipeInstructions:
Elegant but easy. In a bowl, combine crumbs and butter. Pat into the bottom of an ungreased 13x9x2-inch pan. Chill. In a mixing bowl, beat pudding mixes and milk until well blended, about 1 minute. Fold in the ice cream and whipped topping. Spoon over crust. Sprinkle with crushed candy bars. Freeze. Thaw 20 minutes before serving.
(Note: This recipe was featured in Taste of Home Magazine, October/November issue.)
